title: sterculia balanghas var. mollis
intro: Sterculia balanghas var. mollis, also known as the soft Balanghas tree, is a plant species in the family Sterculiaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as aiding in the treatment of fever, cough, and skin conditions, as well as possessing antimicrobial and antifungal properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
